description: I am selling this car for my sister who is deployed in the military. It is currently at the shipping depot ready to be delivered to you. I will pay for shipping.
The car is in perfect condition but I am currently out of the country for work. Please send payment via wire transfer and my shipping agent will deliver it.
We are liquidating estate assets quickly. Price is well below market. Escrow service will hold your funds until you receive the vehicle. Do not contact me asking to see it in person.
Selling fast due to a divorce settlement. I just want it gone. Please use this protected eBay Motors link to complete the transaction.
This is a pre-approved sale. Due to COVID restrictions, no in-person test drives are permitted. We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee after delivery.
Vehicle is stored at a secure military facility. Once you send the Amazon gift cards for the deposit, I will give you the gate code and keys.
Price is firm and very low because we are moving overseas tomorrow. Wire the funds to the provided account and the transport company will bring it to your door.
Excellent condition, no accidents. I'm deaf so I cannot take phone calls. Please email me only and we can arrange the shipping through a third-party broker.
Adult owned, nonsmoker. I have all the service records since new. Oil changed every 3,000 miles with synthetic. Recently replaced the timing belt and water pump.
Garaged its whole life. Paint is immaculate. Added a cold air intake and cat-back exhaust, but I have the original stock parts if you want them.
Clean title in hand. Just passed smog yesterday. Minor wear on the driver's seat bolster, but otherwise the interior is perfect. Upgraded to a larger SUV for the family.
Owned by a certified mechanic. Everything works perfectly. Comes with two sets of keys and the original window sticker. Happy to accommodate a pre-purchase inspection.
This has been my weekend canyon car. Never tracked or abused. Michelin Pilot Sport 4S tires have about 80% tread left. Selling to make room for a new project.
Second owner, purchased CPO from the dealer in 2018. All maintenance up to date (records available). Minor rock chips on the front bumper typical for its age.
Very reliable daily driver. Upgraded the head unit to support Apple CarPlay/Android Auto. Brakes and rotors were done 10k miles ago. Clean Carfax.
Only used for highway commuting. Meticulously maintained. I wash and wax it every month. It pains me to sell it, but I don't need a vehicle anymore.
